message:
chore(deps): update Go dependencies to latest versions

- bubbles v0.18 -> v1.0.0
- bubbletea v0.25 -> v1.3.10
- cobra v1.8 -> v1.10.2
- BurntSushi/toml v1.3.2 -> v1.6.0
- gopsutil v4.25.1 -> v4.26.1
- golang.org/x/term v0.31 -> v0.40
- chroma v2.14 -> v2.23.1
- 30+ other transitive dependency updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
